docTableRows.shape: Record<string, unknown>[] from result.document_fields.tableRows; null if missing/empty

docTableMeta.shape: Record<string, unknown> from result.document_fields.tableMeta; null if missing

alignWidth.note: currently local UI helpers in OcrResultPanel; view model can encode width/align or leave to UI

policySources.rowIndexPolicy: rowIndex is resolved before view model through docTableDisplayCols; tableMeta.columns alone is not sufficient.

cleanJsonVsViewModel.judgement: 기존 Clean JSON fixture 일부 재사용 가능하지만 table_view_model_v1 fixture 별도 필요
why: Clean JSON tables.rows is user export payload, not UI render model.
Clean JSON rows are ordered objects keyed by docTableDisplayCols but do not include columns metadata.
Clean JSON does not include cell displayValue/isEmpty/align/width/rowIndex metadata.
Preview/Custom/Validation need rendering metadata and mode-specific decoration decisions.
Clean JSON fixture can still guard ordered row values and rowIndex/column order baseline.

reuse.scope: ordered raw values and rowIndex/column key baseline

helperNameCandidates.name: buildStructuredTableViewModel
helperNameCandidates.pros: 좁고 명확하다. docTableRows + displayCols 구조화 테이블 전용이라는 현재 1차 범위와 잘 맞는다.
helperNameCandidates.cons: 거래명세서 전용 정책이 숨어 보일 수 있다.

helperNameCandidates.name: buildOcrTableViewModel
helperNameCandidates.pros: 향후 범용 OCR table 모델까지 확장하기 좋다.
helperNameCandidates.cons: 현재 단계에는 범위가 넓고 legacy fallback까지 포함해야 할 것처럼 보인다.

helperNameCandidates.name: buildTableRowsViewModel
helperNameCandidates.cons: columns/cells/meta까지 담는 output과 이름이 조금 맞지 않는다.

helperNameCandidates.name: buildInvoiceStructuredTableViewModel
helperNameCandidates.pros: 거래명세서 rowIndex/column policy와 결합되어 있음을 명확히 한다.
helperNameCandidates.cons: helper가 displayCols만 받는다면 invoice 전용 이름이 과하게 좁다.

recommendedContract.why: First helper should be structured table only, not OCR-table universal and not invoice-only by name. rowIndex/column decisions are already embodied in displayCols.
recommendedContract.modeDecision: Do not include mode in first helper. Build base table model only; Preview/Custom/Validation should decorate it.
recommendedContract.tableMetaDecision: Do not pass tableMeta if displayCols is already computed. Recomputing policy here risks rowIndex/column-order drift.
recommendedContract.customEditDecision: Keep customTableEdits overlay in Custom caller for first extraction. A later helper can accept editRows if needed.
recommendedContract.validationDecision: Validation status/adoption/confidence are row wrapper decorations, not base structured table model.
recommendedContract.legacyDecision: Legacy parseTableField fallback has a different shape. Keep out of first helper; document buildLegacyTableViewModel as separate future candidate.

fixtureDecision.decision: Clean JSON fixture + table_view_model_v1 fixture 병행
why: view model output includes columns/cells/meta not present in Clean JSON.
rowIndex and column order still need direct helper output checks.
Custom/Validation decorations are excluded initially, making view model fixture stable and small.
fixtureDecision.runner: Node/TS helper direct runner after helper extraction; fixture lock can be generated from current OcrResultPanel-derived inputs before extraction.
fixtureDecision.notRecommended: fixture 없이 typecheck/build + existing Clean JSON runner만 사용하는 것은 불충분

workBreakdown.description: current structured table inputs/output contract 기준 JSON fixture 생성
src/lib helper 생성 후 OcrResultPanel에서 structured table rows/cells 모델만 사용
helper를 직접 import해 fixture와 deep equality 비교
Preview/Custom/Validation에서 view model 사용 범위 확대

closeoutTiming.recommendation: 3D contract -> fixture -> helper extraction -> direct runner 이후 close-out 생성 권장
closeoutTiming.reason: 지금 close-out하면 table view model 결과가 빠져 cleanup cycle 판단이 덜 닫힌다.
